meta.title: SONKEI — premium baby diapers
meta.description: Quiet premium care, Japanese-inspired softness and technical comfort for delicate baby skin.

home.heroCopy: SONKEI makes baby diapers with Japanese attention to detail: softness, dryness and parental calm day and night.
home.storyCopy: Every layer supports dryness, fit and delicate skin contact. No clutter, no inflated promises.
home.detailsCopy: We kept the strongest product claims from the old site and made them quieter: a system of protection, softness and dryness control.
home.reviewsTrust: 98% positive marketplace reviews across CIS marketplaces
home.showcaseCopy: Premium, ultra thin and daily soft lines for different growth stages.
home.wholesaleCopy: Retail customers continue to the catalog and cart. Partners get a separate quiet channel for requests, documents and supply terms.
home.loyaltyCopy: Points accrue on every order and can be applied in cart as a soft discount.

catalog.title: SONKEI Catalog
catalog.copy: Filters, search and sorting powered by real Excel SKUs.
catalog.search: Search by size, SKU or name

product.reviewSubmitted: Thank you! Your review is pending moderation.
product.reviewLoginRequired: Log in to leave a review

cart.title: Cart
cart.emptyCopy: Choose a SONKEI size and the cart will keep items and rewards locally.
cart.ready: Architecture is ready for payment integration
cart.minPromo: Subtotal is too low for this promo

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.name: Name
checkout.deliveryNote: Precise CDEK calculation will be connected at the next stage — an estimated rate applies for now.

checkout.agreePrivacy: I agree with the privacy policy
checkout.errorAgreement: Agreement with the offer and privacy policy is required
checkout.errorSubmit: Failed to place the order. Please try again.
checkout.errorUnavailable: Some items are no longer available, check your cart

account.title: Account
account.copy: Profile, orders, rewards, wishlist and settings in a premium app-like interface.
account.addressLoginRequired: Log in to manage your addresses.
account.orderNoTracking: Tracking number will appear once the order ships
account.orderCancelConfirm: Cancel this order? This cannot be undone.

admin.title: SONKEI Admin
admin.copy: Dashboard for products, orders, rewards, promo codes and reviews.

contacts.title: SONKEI Contacts
contacts.copy: Official contacts, company details and warehouse address for customers, partners and wholesale requests.
contacts.wholesaleCopy: After the request is sent, we contact you, discuss terms and send supporting documents.
contacts.name: Name

authFlow.forgotCopy: Enter your email — if an account exists, we'll send a password reset link.
authFlow.forgotSent: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent.
authFlow.resetCopy: Choose a new password for your account.
authFlow.resetInvalid: This link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
authFlow.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
authFlow.verifyError: This link is invalid or expired
authFlow.loginCopy: Sign in to see your orders, bonuses, and delivery addresses.
authFlow.registerCopy: Create a SONKEI account to earn bonuses and track your orders.
authFlow.registerPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

legalPages.privacyCopy: Adapted from the existing SONKEI policy on the old site and should receive final legal review before publication.
legalPages.offerCopy: A base offer structure for e-commerce. Before accepting online payments, the text should be reviewed by legal counsel and the payment provider.
legalPages.cooperationCopy: Wholesale supply, documents and partner communication for SONKEI.

footer.copy: SONKEI — baby hygiene with Japanese calm.
